feed.title: Current Watches, Warnings and Advisories for New Zealand issued by MetService
feed.rights: Copyright Meteorological Service of New Zealand Limited, 2026. Licensed under Creative Commons BY 4.0.

entry.title: Heavy Rain Warning - Orange
entry.summary: Expect a further 80 to 120 mm of rain on top of what has already fallen. Intensities of 15 to 25 mm per hour expected, and there is a chance of downpours of 25 to 40 mm per hour, which may or may not be associated with thunderstorms. Conditions may ease south of Bay of Islands earlier Saturday morning. Impact: Streams and rivers may rise rapidly. Surface flooding, slips, and difficult driving conditions possible. Chance of upgrading to a Red Warning: Low. Changes: Warning extended to cover all of eastern Northland and all areas from the Karikari Peninsula northwards.

author.name: Meteorological Service of New Zealand Limited

entry.title: Heavy Rain Watch
entry.summary: Periods of heavy rain, and a low risk of localised downpours. Accumulations may approach warning criteria in some places. Conditions expected to ease south of Dargaville after about 3am. Chance of upgrading to a Warning: Moderate. Changes: Areas about northeast Northland now included in Warning area.

author.name: Meteorological Service of New Zealand Limited
